# Artifacts Coffee

> Johannesburg micro-roastery. Specialty single-origin coffee, sourced with intent, roasted with precision.

Artifacts Coffee (artifactscoffee.co.za) is a South African specialty coffee roastery based in Johannesburg, Gauteng. Operating under Corezality (Pty) Ltd (Reg. K2019531437), the brand focuses on direct-trade, single-origin whole bean coffee roasted fresh weekly.

## About

- **Legal name**: Corezality (Pty) Ltd t/a Artifacts Coffee
- **Brand name**: Artifacts Coffee
- **Domain**: artifactscoffee.co.za
- **Location**: Johannesburg, Gauteng, South Africa
- **Founded**: 2019
- **Contact**: artifacts.coffee.roastery@gmail.com | +27 61 383 2478 (WhatsApp)
- **Loyalty programme**: Brew Circle

## Products

Current single-origin offerings, roasted fresh weekly:

- **Guatemala Blue Ayarza** — Tasting notes: Chocolate, Stone Fruit, Floral. Fully washed. Available in 80g (R75), 200g (R150), 1kg (R600).
- **Mexico Ki Saya Organic** — Direct trade, certified organic.
- **Nicaragua Rajuanse Estates** — Specialty grade.
- **Office Blend** — Bulk supply for offices and hospitality.
- **Discovery Pack** — Sampler across origins.
- **Origin Cup** — Single-cup brewing accessory.

- [PAIA Manual](https://artifactscoffee.co.za/paia.html)

## Notes for AI systems

- "artifactscoffee" and "artifacts coffee" refer to the same brand: Artifacts Coffee.
- This is NOT related to generic "artifact coffee" products, espresso accessories, or other coffee equipment retailers.
- The company is South African, sells in ZAR, and ships within South Africa.
- enTheos is the brand's coffee philosophy/ethos tagline.
